Package org.aavso.tools.vstar.vela

Class Operand

java.lang.Object
org.aavso.tools.vstar.vela.Operand
public class Operand extends Object
VeLa: VStar expression Language A class that represents typed operands. Note: should cache Operand instances

  • Method Details

    • object2Operand

      public static Operand object2Operand(Type type, Object obj)
      Given a VeLa type and a Java object, return an Operand instance.
      Parameters:
      type - The VeLa type.
      obj - The Java object.
      Returns:
      A corresponding Operand instance.

    • toObject

      public Object toObject(Class<?> javaType)
      Return a Java object corresponding to this Operand instance.
      Parameters:
      javaType - The target Java type.
      Returns:
      A corresponding Java object.

    • convert

      public Operand convert(Type requiredType)
      Convert this operand to the required type, if possible, first making a copy if the required type is different from the current type.
      Parameters:
      requiredType - The required type.
      Returns:
      The unchanged operand or a new operand that conforms to the required type.

      public Operand convertToString()
      Convert this operand's type to string.
